category_sources: source_facts.description says "Rxvt fork with Unicode support"; official homepage describes rxvt-unicode as a fork of rxvt and lists terminal emulator features.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rxvt-unicode; official homepage heading uses rxvt-unicode.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the project documentation hub and links to the official FAQ; official CVS tree hosts the manual POD files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage links documentation under cvs.schmorp.de, and the official CVS source tree for rxvt-unicode is https://cvs.schmorp.de/rxvt-unicode/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Unicode support; official homepage lists Unicode storage, locale-correct input/output, daemon mode, embedded Perl, tabs, URL handling, and scrollback search.
